ai_summary: This document details extensive board and senior management restructuring at Aster DM Healthcare Limited, now Aster DM Quality Care Limited, following its amalgamation with Quality Care India Limited. Key changes include the appointment of a new Managing Director & Group CEO, Varun Khanna, and two Non-Executive Directors from Blackstone Private Equity, signaling a strategic shift and significant investor influence post-merger. A notable point is the re-designation of the Executive Chairman and a former Deputy Managing Director as Non-Key Managerial Personnel, which could indicate a change in operational leadership dynamics.
